search.query: `cisco_dc_n9k_index` sourcetype=cisco:dc:nexus9k | lookup cisco_dc_nexus_hostname_lookup device AS device OUTPUT hostname AS hostname1 | lookup cisco_dc_nexus_hostname_lookup device_without_port as device OUTPUT hostname as hostname2 | eval hostname = coalesce(hostname1, hostname2) | eval hostAndHostname = hostname."(".device.")" | stats values(device) as Device by hostAndHostname | fields hostAndHostname Device | sort 0 hostAndHostname

html.p: This dashboard gives visibility into overall inventory of nexus switches. It lets user drill down into specific inventory and display its details by clicking on a device ip or hostname.

search.query: | search Device=$multiTokenQuery$ | where like(name,"%Chassis%") | table hostname,Device,serialnum,productid,platform,uptime | rename hostname as Hostname serialnum AS "Serial Number" productid AS "Product ID" platform as Platform uptime as Uptime

| search hostname=$hostnametoken$ | where like(desc,"%Ethernet%Module%") | table hostname,Device,name,n,desc,serialnum,productid,"Hardware Version","Software Version",Status | rename hostname as Hostname desc AS Description serialnum AS "Serial Number" productid AS "Product ID" name AS Name | fields - n

| search hostname=$hostnametoken$ | where like(productid,"%-FM%") |eval n=replace(name,"([\w]+)\s([\d]+)","\2")| table hostname,Device,name,n,desc,serialnum,productid,"Hardware Version","Software Version",Status | rename hostname as Hostname desc AS Description serialnum AS "Serial Number" productid AS "Product ID" name AS Name | fields - n

|search hostname=$hostnametoken$ | where like(productid,"%-PAC%") | table hostname,Device,name,desc,serialnum,productid| rename hostname as Hostname desc AS Description serialnum AS "Serial Number" productid AS "Product ID" name AS Name

| search hostname=$hostnametoken$ |where like(desc,"%Fan Module%") | table hostname,Device,name,desc,serialnum,productid | rename hostname as Hostname desc AS Description serialnum AS "Serial Number" productid AS "Product ID" name AS Name

| search hostname=$hostnametoken$ | where like(productid, "%-SUP-%") OR like(productid, "%-vSUP%") | table hostname,Device,name,n,desc,serialnum,productid, "Hardware Version","Software Version",Status | rename hostname as Hostname desc AS Description serialnum AS "Serial Number" productid AS "Product ID" name AS Name

| search hostname=$hostnametoken$ | where like(productid,"%-SC-%") | table hostname,Device,name,n,desc,serialnum,productid,"Hardware Version","Software Version",Status | rename hostname as Hostname desc AS Description serialnum AS "Serial Number" productid AS "Product ID" name AS Name
